headline: A Look At Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Old Dominion Freight Line stock reaction and recent performance snapshot Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) has drawn investor attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock up 3% over the past week but showing a small decline over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Old Dominion Freight Line has posted a 24.6% total return, while the 1 year total return stands at 17.8%. Year to date, the stock is up 22.7%. headline: Old Dominion Freight Line to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Conference Call
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., April 01, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced today that it plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial results before opening of trading on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The Company will also hold a conference call to discuss its financial results and outlook at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on Wednesday, April 29, 2026.
